creator: Maneka Menon

evidence.locator: primary page, 'Stop to go faster' recommendations
evidence.text: Macquarie's Chief Scrum Master recommends never deprioritizing retrospectives, maintaining a continuous-improvement board where actions are tracked and prioritized, assigning OKRs to improvement areas, and reserving capacity such as Innovation Days so reflection and adaptation occur across teams.

provenance: Primary Macquarie Engineering publication manually re-reviewed from blocked saturation discovery on 2026-07-12.
relevance_evidence: A Macquarie leader documents concrete retrospectives, improvement backlogs, measurements, and reserved reflection capacity used by its teams.
retrieval_method: manual primary-page review via public web reader
rights_note: Only a bounded paraphrased evidence span is stored; no complete third-party page is copied.
title: The (not so) secret ingredient — prioritising continuous improvement
